_delete_after_bootstrap: Delete ALL keys prefixed with '_' (including this one, _instructions, _example_group, _example_knockout) after populating with real data. These are guides, not data.

_instructions.structure: Group stage: flat array (not nested by matchday). Knockout: one section per round. All 104 matches required.
_instructions.venue_names: Use FIFA venue names (e.g. 'New York New Jersey Stadium' not 'MetLife Stadium') — these cross-reference stadiums.json directly.
_instructions.knockout: Opponents unknown before earlier rounds resolve — use descriptive match fields like 'Winner B vs 3rd E/F/G/I/J'.
_instructions.global: tournament, hosts, total_matches, and format are boilerplate. Keep them.

format: 48 teams, 12 groups of 4. Top 2 advance + 8 best 3rd place teams = Round of 32.
